# COCHomeless

Datasets and spatial tools for United States homelessness research.
`COCHomeless` packages HUD Continuum of Care (CoC) Point-in-Time (PIT)
homeless counts, CoC boundaries, a Census-to-CoC crosswalk, and
county-level homeless estimates, covering **2007–2025**.

## Installation

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("SSDALab/COCHomeless", build_vignettes = TRUE)
library(COCHomeless)
```

`sf` is required (spatial objects). `tidycensus`, `ggplot2`, `tigris`,
`imputeTS` and a few others are only needed to rebuild data or run the
vignettes.

## Coverage

All series run **2007 through 2025** (annual). The 2025 PIT counts are
HUD’s official release; `hud2025_prelim` keeps the earlier Community
Solutions estimate for reference. In 2021 HUD waived the unsheltered
count for many CoCs during COVID-19, so 2021 understates homelessness —
the vignettes show an ARIMA reconstruction.

## Three forms of data

**1. CoC level (HUD administrative areas)**

| Object                | What                                                |
|-----------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| `hud2007` … `hud2025` | PIT “Overall Homeless” count per CoC, by year       |
| `coc2007` … `coc2025` | CoC boundary polygons (national `sf`), by year      |
| `coc_mergers`         | CoC merger crosswalk over time (code lineage)       |
| `pit_us`              | national totals split into sheltered / unsheltered  |
| `hud2025_prelim`      | preliminary 2025 estimate (superseded by `hud2025`) |

**2. Census ↔︎ CoC crosswalk** (links Census tracts/counties to CoCs)

| Object | What |
|----|----|
| `tract_coc2007` … `tract_coc2025` | tract → CoC hard assignment, by year |
| `tract_coc_wt2007` … `tract_coc_wt2025` | tract ↔︎ CoC area weights, by year |
| `county_coc2007` … `county_coc2025` | county ↔︎ CoC weights (both directions), by year |

Tract geography uses 2010-census tracts for 2007–2019 and 2020-census
tracts for 2020–2025.

**3. County-level estimates** (CoC counts disaggregated to counties)

| Object | What |
|----|----|
| `homeless` | county estimates `count07`…`count25` + ACS covariates (imputed) |
| `homeless_na` | same, before imputation (missing counties as `NA`) |
| `sp_homeless` | `homeless` as an `sf` object for mapping |
| `counties`, `states` | full-US `sf` base layers |
| `area` | county land area (km²) |

## Vignettes

After installing with `build_vignettes = TRUE`:

``` r

browseVignettes("COCHomeless")
```

- **CoC Point-in-Time homeless counts** (`coc-pit-counts`) — national &
  state maps, per-CoC trends, sheltered/unsheltered series with ARIMA
  reconstruction of 2021.
- **County-level homeless estimates** (`county-estimates`) —
  county-vs-CoC comparison, per-capita maps, US/CA/WA trends, a 2025
  summary grid.
- **Census-to-CoC crosswalk** (`census-coc-crosswalk`) — using the
  crosswalk and `coc_mergers`.

Vignette sources are in
[`vignettes/`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/vignettes); build
scripts that regenerate every dataset from source are in
[`data-raw/`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/data-raw).

## Methodology & citation

County estimates disaggregate CoC PIT counts by population density and
impute counties with no CoC, following Almquist, Helwig & You (2020).
Please cite:

> Almquist, Z. W., Helwig, N. E., & You, Y. (2020). Connecting Continuum
> of Care point-in-time homeless counts to United States Census areal
> units. *Mathematical Population Studies*, 27(1), 46–58.
> <https://doi.org/10.1080/08898480.2019.1636574>

The Census-to-CoC crosswalk follows Tom Byrne’s
[HUD-CoC-Geography-Crosswalk](https://github.com/tomhbyrne/HUD-CoC-Geography-Crosswalk);
please credit it when using the `tract_coc*` / `county_coc*` data. Run
`citation("COCHomeless")` for full details.

ACS pulls need a Census API key in `~/.Renviron` (`CENSUS_API_KEY`);
never commit it.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`area`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/area.md) :
  Area for all U.S. counties by FIPS code (excluding U.S. territories)
- [`coc2007`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2008`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2009`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2010`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2011`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2012`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2013`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2014`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2015`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2016`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2017`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2018`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2019`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2020`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2021`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2022`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2023`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2024`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md)
  [`coc2025`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc.md) :
  CoC geographic boundaries, 2007-2025
- [`coc_mergers`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/coc_mergers.md)
  : Continuum of Care (CoC) merger crosswalk over time
- [`counties`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/counties.md)
  : U.S. county boundaries
- [`county_coc2007`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2008`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2009`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2010`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2011`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2012`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2013`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2014`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2015`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2016`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2017`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2018`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2019`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2020`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2021`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2022`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2023`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2024`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  [`county_coc2025`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/county_coc.md)
  : County to CoC area-weighted crosswalk
- [`homeless`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/homeless.md)
  : County-level homeless estimates, 2007-2024 (missing values imputed)
- [`homeless_na`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/homeless_na.md)
  : County-level homeless estimates, 2007-2025 (pre-imputation, with
  missing values)
- [`hud2007`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2008`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2009`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2010`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2011`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2012`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2013`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2014`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2015`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2016`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2017`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2018`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2019`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2020`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2021`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2022`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2023`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2024`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md)
  [`hud2025`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud.md) :
  CoC-level Point-in-Time (PIT) homeless counts, 2007-2025
- [`hud2025_prelim`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/hud2025_prelim.md)
  : Preliminary 2025 homelessness estimates (NOT official HUD data)
- [`pit_us`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/pit_us.md)
  : National Point-in-Time homeless totals by shelter status, 2007-2025
- [`sp_homeless`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/sp_homeless.md)
  : County homeless estimates as a spatial (sf) object
- [`states`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/states.md)
  : U.S. state and territory boundaries
- [`tract_coc2007`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2008`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2009`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2010`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2011`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2012`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2013`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2014`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2015`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2016`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2017`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2018`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2019`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2020`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2021`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2022`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2023`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2024`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  [`tract_coc2025`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc.md)
  : Census tract to Continuum of Care (CoC) hard assignment crosswalk
- [`tract_coc_wt2007`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2008`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2009`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2010`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2011`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2012`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2013`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2014`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2015`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2016`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2017`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2018`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2019`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2020`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2021`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2022`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2023`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2024`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  [`tract_coc_wt2025`](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/reference/tract_coc_wt.md)
  : Tract to CoC area-weighted overlap crosswalk

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Census-to-CoC
  crosswalk](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/articles/census-coc-crosswalk.md):
- [CoC Point-in-Time homeless
  counts](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/articles/coc-pit-counts.md):
- [County-level homeless
  estimates](https://ssdalab.github.io/COCHomeless/articles/county-estimates.md):
